subject: [PATCH v8 0/9] Automatic NFSv4 state revocation on filesystem unmount

reviews.author: Chuck Lever
reviews.summary: Reviewer noted that the subject line is misleading, as the patch no longer performs automatic NFSv4 state revocation on filesystem unmount, but rather when unexporting.
reviews.raw_body:
The Subject: matches what I used on the v1 posting. But you're correct,
the mission of this patch series has changed.

2026-04-08.patch_summary: This patch series introduces automatic revocation of NFSv4 state when a filesystem is unexported, rather than on unmount. This change addresses the issue where existing code only revoked state on unmount, potentially leaving stale state behind. The approach taken involves modifying the NFSv4 code to revoke state during unexporting.
